Our Story

About NP CFO Advisory LLC

NP CFO Advisory LLC is a specialized financial advisory practice dedicated to supporting mission-driven organizations with strategic financial leadership, strong governance, and modern financial systems.

Mission-driven organizations operate in increasingly complex financial environments that require transparency, accountability, and thoughtful financial planning. We work alongside leaders, boards, and finance teams to strengthen strategy and improve reporting.

Our approach emphasizes practical solutions, strong governance, and financial transparency so organizations can focus on advancing their mission.

We operate across the United States and Internationally, serving nonprofit organizations and mission-driven institutions from our teams on the East and West Coasts and reaching clients worldwide.
